name: Hire a follow-up coordinator vs automate follow-ups

best_case.label: best
best_case.narrative: Automation handles nearly all follow-ups; the salary is avoided and coverage rises.

likely_case.label: likely
likely_case.narrative: Automation covers most follow-ups with occasional human cleanup.

worst_case.label: worst
worst_case.narrative: Automation underperforms and a hire becomes necessary anyway.

risks.description: Automation quality may erode trust if replies feel robotic.
risks.mitigation: Keep human approval on the first 30 days of drafts.

recommendation: Start with automation plus light oversight; revisit hiring only if coverage stays below 60%.
decision_needed: Approve the automation-first path, or commit to a hire now?
